name: Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC)
summary: Day 87 (Monday May 25). **HORMUZ 'MANAGEMENT' PRE-POSITIONING SHARPENS AS THE DEAL ACQUIRES A PHYSICAL VENUE.** The contradiction the IRGC-aligned outlets sustain — Fars's 'Iran's management / not free passage as before the war' — now directly contradicts the US/Axios 'open with no tolls, mines cleared' framing, with Tasnim allocating '30 days for Hormuz procedures and 60 days for nuclear talks' [CONFIRMED both framings on the record; CONTESTED which is in the text]. **This is IRGC institutional pre-positioning for the Iran-Oman 'permanent toll mechanism' Rubio's May 21 red line rejected — branding any transit as IRGC-permission-granted, not a formal announcement (trigger Day 4 of 14 stays `watching`).** The IRGC architecture is positioned inside the deal-track dual channel: the Qatar route operates via IRGC senior generals (Axios), and the senior Iranian delegation now in Doha (Ghalibaf + Araghchi + central-bank governor Hemmati) working Hormuz + HEU + frozen assets is the structural evidence the backchannel is operating. **IRGC posture remains graduated restraint within the Gulf-mediated deal window — rhetoric without action while the negotiation moves to a physical venue.** Operationally Hormuz transits remain minimal — no operational reopening, Day 87. PRIOR (May 24): **TASNIM 'PREPARING FOR RESUMING FIGHTING' MILITARY-SOURCE PIECE NOT FOLLOWED UP SUNDAY — MODEST COOLING FROM SATURDAY'S AGGRESSIVE FRAMING. IRGC GLOBAL-OFFENSIVE RHETORIC NOT AMPLIFIED. NO IRGC NAVY HORMUZ DAILY-TRANSIT CLAIM IN MAY 24 PUBLIC WIRE THROUGH SUNDAY EVENING — POSSIBLY A SUNDAY GAP OR ABSENCE OF CLAIM. THE IRGC ARCHITECTURE IS NOW POSITIONED INSIDE THE DEAL-TRACK DUAL-CHANNEL: QATAR ROUTE OPERATES VIA IRGC SENIOR GENERALS (AXIOS) — QATARI NEGOTIATING TEAM IN TEHRAN SINCE FRIDAY MAY 22 IS THE STRUCTURAL EVIDENCE. IRGC INSTITUTIONAL POSTURE IS GRADUATED RESTRAINT WITHIN THE GULF-MEDIATED DEAL WINDOW — RHETORIC WITHOUT ACTION (HOUTHI HAIFA, GLOBAL OFFENSIVE) WHILE BACKCHANNEL OPERATES.** PRIOR (May 23): IRGC NAVY CLAIMED 25 SHIPS TRANSITED HORMUZ MAY 23 IN PAST 24H 'WITH IRGC NAVY COORDINATION AND SECURITY' — SECOND CONSECUTIVE DAILY CLAIM IN 25-35 VESSEL RANGE. CLAIM CONTRADICTED BY BLOOMBERG/LLOYD'S/UKMTO 'LARGELY FROZEN' FRAMING; AWRP ~1% HOLDING INCONSISTENT WITH 25 DAILY SAFE TRANSITS. THE CLAIM IS PROPAGANDA LOCK-IN FOR IRAN-OMAN 'PERMANENT TOLL MECHANISM' ARCHITECTURE RUBIO'S MAY 21 RED LINE REJECTED. PARALLEL: TASNIM (IRGC-AFFILIATED) MAY 23 REPORTED 'IRAN PREPARING FOR RESUMING FIGHTING WITH THE UNITED STATES AND ISRAEL' — MILITARY SOURCE PRIMARY.** (1) **IRGC Navy May 23 claim** (CLAIMED — Al Jazeera May 23 secondary; IRGC primary): 25 ships passed Hormuz in past 24h including oil tankers, container ships, other commercial vessels 'after obtaining permission with the coordination and security of the IRGC Navy.' **Structurally inconsistent with**: (a) Baker Hughes assessment that full Hormuz reopen is 'not until 2H26'; (b) marine war risk insurance AWRP holding ~1% of hull (vs 0.1-0.15% pre-war); (c) VLCC rate evidence (Frontline Q2 TCEs $181,700/day with 82% coverage book). **The intelligence value of the claim is in its consistency**: Iran rhetorically branding any transit as IRGC-permission-granted = propaganda lock-in for Iran-Oman 'permanent toll mechanism' architecture Rubio's May 21 red line explicitly rejected. (2) **Tasnim (IRGC-affiliated) May 23 reported, citing a military source**, that 'Iran is preparing for resuming fighting with the United States and Israel' (Haaretz liveblog corroboration, Tasnim primary) — symmetrically pre-positioning at the moment Munir COAS is in Tehran for 'encouraging progress' talks. **This is the cleanest Iranian-side public preparation signal of the cycle.** (3) **The simultaneity is the signal**: kinetic deliverable (IRGC propaganda + military preparation) and diplomatic deliverable (Munir-COAS-Pezeshkian) running in parallel narrative channels. The May 22 'two-hubris' pattern is now at maximum institutional fanout — IRGC + Khamenei's office substantively NO + civilian-government procedural via Pakistan track. (4) **The IRGC trigger architecture**: Houthi Haifa rhetoric Day 5 of 14 (no kinetic, no Lloyd's JWC change); Mojtaba uranium directive Day 2 of 14 (regime-internal signal via leak architecture). PRIOR (May 22): **IRGC THREATENED 'GLOBAL OFFENSIVE' MAY 21 — CONFIRMED RHETORIC, NO OPERATIONAL FOLLOW-THROUGH. ESCALATES BEYOND PRIOR IRIB 'RETREAT-BASED-ON-FEAR' FRAMING (MAY 19). IRGC HORMUZ TRANSIT CLAIM (35 VESSELS, 24 HOURS) MAY 22 IS CLAIMED — INDEPENDENT MARITIME TRACKERS CONTRADICT.** (1) **IRGC May 21 'global offensive' threat (CONFIRMED RHETORIC — Iran International May 21, The Week May 20, CBS News liveblog)**: IRGC issued a statement threatening to launch a 'global offensive' if attacks restart, including framing about 'war beyond Middle East.' **The 'global offensive' framing escalates beyond the prior IRIB May 19 'retreat-based-on-fear' framing — IRGC is now actively threatening kinetic escalation OUTSIDE Iran's regional theater, which is a rhetorical lever the regime has not fully deployed since the cycle began.** **NO operational follow-through verified across May 21-22** (no missile launches, no proxy attack scaling beyond established patterns). **Tag holds at RHETORIC.** (2) **IRGC Hormuz transit claim May 22 (CLAIMED)**: IRGC Navy Force announced May 22 that 35 vessels (oil tankers, container ships, other commercial) had passed through the Strait of Hormuz over past 24 hours (IRGC primary via Iran-aligned media). **Independent maritime trackers (hormuzstraitmonitor.com, IranWarLive, Bloomberg Hormuz Tracker May 17) continue 'largely frozen' framing** with 'limited vessel movements observed and most tied to Iranian-linked shipping.' The 35-vessels claim likely refers to ALL Hormuz transits including Iranian coastal/cabotage traffic, NOT international VLCC/tanker traffic that would represent meaningful blockade easing. **1,550 stranded vessels and 22,500 trapped mariners headline figure remains operative.** (3) **Iranian state-media institutional divergence operationally active**: Tasnim (IRGC-linked) ran counter-proposal procedural framing emphasizing the deliverables Iran wants (end of war, sanctions lift, frozen-assets release, end of US blockade, war reparations). IRNA (civilian-government-aligned) covered Naqvi-Araghchi meetings WITHOUT amplifying IRGC's 'global offensive' rhetoric — **internal Iranian institutional divergence flagged in May 19 brief now operationally active**: civilian-government (Pezeshkian/Araghchi) procedurally engaged with Pakistan track; IRGC + Khamenei's office rhetorically + substantively NO. (4) **The Sadjadpour two-hubris pattern at higher amplitude**: Iran's institutional architecture is generating SIMULTANEOUS procedural-positive (Tasnim on the deliverables Iran wants) and rhetorical-maximalist (IRGC global offensive) signals — not synchronized policy, but architected multi-track signal where each institutional layer signals consistently within its own brief. PRIOR (May 19): **A5 IRGC IN TASNIM MOJTABA-BRIEFING NARRATIVE** — Major General Ali Abdollahi (commander of Iran's Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters — the supreme command HQ over the army, IRGC, police, intelligence, border forces, defense ministry, Basij militia) reportedly briefed Mojtaba on armed-forces readiness (CLAIMED — Tasnim state-affiliated; report ABOUT Mojtaba, not BY/OF Mojtaba). Second state-media positioning act in three days; Middle East Forum frames as deliberate state-media campaign to reinforce Mojtaba's leadership narrative without producing him. **A4 HOUTHI RED SEA DAY 7 OF 7 NEGATIVE-SPACE WINDOW CLOSES UNTRIPPED** — proxy network operating well below historic kinetic ceiling; coordinated quietism with TASS/Xinhua + Mojtaba silence + Hezbollah calibrated attrition. **IRGC OPERATIONAL POSTURE: Kharg air-defense reinforcement (REPORTED — single-source US intel chain via NYT) carries forward as the active posture** — predictable response to publicly-discussed US ground operation. IRGC has NOT publicly addressed the Kharg air-defense reinforcement through Monday morning IST. **PRIOR (May 17): IRGC OPERATIONAL POSTURE TRANSITIONING FROM TEHRAN DRILL TO KHARG REINFORCEMENT (REPORTED).** Per NYT (Friday May 15 / Saturday May 16, citing US intelligence reporting), **Iran has laid traps and moved additional military personnel and air defenses to Kharg Island in recent weeks** in preparation for possible US ground operation. Kharg sits 20 miles off the Iranian mainland and handles up to 90% of Iran's oil exports — IRGC Navy and IRGC Aerospace (air-defense) responsibility. Air-defense reinforcement is the predictable response to a publicly-discussed ground operation. **The 'Martyred Commander / Labbayk Ya Khamenei' Tehran-corps drill (closed May 15 Day 5/5) was the rehearsal; the Kharg reinforcement is operational application.** Single-source chain (NYT citing US intel) limits verification to REPORTED — but operational signature visible at known location with prior satellite coverage. **A5 MOJTABA KHAMENEI DAY 10 SILENCE** — IRGC drill's invocation of late Ali Khamenei rather than Mojtaba continues to be the cleanest institutional tell of the cycle on Mojtaba's constrained authority. **No new IRGC drill announced as of May 17; the Martyred Commander drill ended May 15.** The Artesh-Akraminia 'surprising options' rhetoric from May 14-15 carries forward — coordinated kinetic-readiness messaging across BOTH Iranian military pillars persists. **IRGC has NOT publicly addressed the Kharg air-defense reinforcement** — consistent with operational opacity rather than denial. **PRIOR (May 15):** Day 77. A7 IRGC 'MARTYRED COMMANDER' / 'LABBAYK YA KHAMENEI' COMBAT EXERCISE CLOSED DAY 5/5 — HASSANZADEH STATEMENT THAT ALL OBJECTIVES ACHIEVED** (CONFIRMED — Mehr News + News.az + Islam Times + Pars Today). Brig. Gen. Hassan Hassanzadeh, commander IRGC Great Tehran Corps, confirmed all pre-rehearsed scenarios, individual combat techniques, and team tactics were executed and evaluated during the 5-day drill involving rapid reaction forces, special forces, IRGC and Basij commando units. **The drill's invocation of the deceased Ali Khamenei (codename 'Labbayk Ya Khamenei') rather than the new Supreme Leader Mojtaba is the institutional tell: the IRGC is publicly leaning on the late patriarch's legacy rather than the constrained successor.** The IRGC also ran a parallel 'Anti-Heliborne War Game' — a counter-Special-Operations-insertion drill that maps directly to the kind of US ground-raid posture that would follow if Sledgehammer were ordered. **The drill's completion today coincides with the closing of Trump's 1-week clock window and the ongoing Washington Israel-Lebanon talks — kinetic preparation reaching its scheduled completion exactly as the diplomatic track also reaches its scheduled checkpoints.** **B5 IRANIAN ARMY (ARTESH) SPOKESPERSON BRIG. GEN. AKRAMINIA 'SURPRISING OPTIONS' RHETORIC** in parallel IRNA interview is the cleanest signal yet of coordinated kinetic-readiness messaging across BOTH Iranian military pillars (Artesh + IRGC) exactly as the Trump-Xi joint statement was being issued. **A12 prior framing (carries forward): IRGC encoded as preparation/signaling, NOT actual kinetic operation** — per CRITICAL TAG-DISCIPLINE FLAG 8, do not promote to 'Iran kinetic restart.' Multi-channel Iranian state-media synchronisation continues: IRNA + Tasnim + Mehr News + Press TV + Islam Times + Pars Today all carried the drill conclusion as top-of-coverage with codename invoking deceased Ali rather than supposedly-active Mojtaba. (CONFIRMED ACTION — Mehr News primary, Press TV, Tasnim, Islam Times, Pars Today, WION, News.az). Mohammad Rasulullah Division (Tehran Corps) under Brig. Gen. Hassan Hassanzadeh confirmed exercise purpose: 'enhancing combat ability to counter any hostile move by the American-Zionist enemy.' **Codename invokes the LATE Ali Khamenei (Mojtaba's father), NOT supposedly-active new Supreme Leader = institutional imagery leaning on Ali's legacy because Mojtaba's visible authority is constrained**. Tasnim simultaneously (May 13) ran separate piece 'IRGC Division Holds Anti-Heliborne War Game' — Special Operations counter-insertion drill suggests Iran preparing for US ground-raid posture that could follow if Pentagon's contingency-named 'Operation Sledgehammer' (B2 NBC News May 12) is ordered. **Cleanest single operational confirmation that Iran's military is preparing for a restart scenario, even as political track continues.** Both Iran (IRGC drill) and US (Sledgehammer naming) are signalling kinetic preparedness around Trump-return decision window May 15-20. Multi-channel Iranian state-media synchronisation: IRNA + Tasnim + Mehr News + Press TV + Islam Times + Pars Today all running the drill as top-of-coverage. **IRGC encoded as preparation/signaling, NOT actual kinetic operation** — per CRITICAL TAG-DISCIPLINE FLAG 8, do not promote to 'Iran kinetic restart.' PRIOR (May 7): **IRGC FACTIONAL HARDLINE-LEVERAGE TRACK CONTINUES IN PARALLEL TO MOU DIPLOMACY: TASNIM (IRGC-aligned) CALLED THE 14-POINT MOU 'MORE OF A WISHLIST THAN A REALITY' MAY 6 — preserving hardline-leverage rhetoric but NOT calling for retaliation/escalation.** Press TV (IRGC-adjacent state propaganda, English audience) ran 'Project Freedom perishes in 48 hours as Trump retreats under wall of Iran's asymmetric deterrence' — triumphalist victory framing, the kind of language that historically PRECEDES acceptance of a deal because it provides rhetorical cover for the regime to claim leverage success regardless of substantive terms. Internal Iranian posture divergence is now structural: Pezeshkian/Araghchi civilian government on negotiating track (Baqaei: 'assessing,' 'lasting peace top priority') vs IRGC/Tasnim leverage track. **CMA CGM San Antonio struck May 5 by cruise missile (CBS attribution to Iranian cruise missile, IRGC has NOT claimed — itself unusual) demonstrates IRGC tactical leverage continues at operational layer despite civilian-government diplomatic-track signals.** The bifurcation between kinetic risk and political track is now structural — France's Charles de Gaulle CSG redeployment Suez→Red Sea/Gulf of Aden is the European naval response. Mojtaba Day 60-61 absent (AI-generated videos confirmed by TIME) — supreme-leader vacuum is the structural reason both tracks are operating in parallel without unified executive resolution.

recent_signals.headline: **HORMUZ 'MANAGEMENT' PRE-POSITIONING SHARPENED AGAINST US 'NO TOLLS' FRAMING; IRGC-LINKED OUTLETS SUSTAIN 'NOT FREE PASSAGE' LINE + TASNIM 30/60-DAY SPLIT AS THE NEGOTIATION MOVES TO DOHA. IRAN-OMAN PERMANENT TOLL MECHANISM TRIGGER DAY 4 OF 14 — STILL PRE-POSITIONING, NO FORMAL ANNOUNCEMENT.** (1) **Contradiction sharpened [CONFIRMED both framings; CONTESTED which is in text]**: Fars's IRGC-aligned 'Iran's management / not free passage as before the war' line stands uncorrected against the US/Axios 'open with no tolls, mines cleared' reconstruction; Tasnim (IRGC-affiliated) allocates '30 days for Strait of Hormuz procedures and 60 days for nuclear talks.' The IRGC's intelligence value is in the consistency — rhetorically branding any transit as IRGC-permission-granted = propaganda lock-in for the Iran-Oman 'permanent toll mechanism' Rubio's May 21 red line explicitly rejected. (2) **The deal-track dual channel operating**: the Qatar route runs via IRGC senior generals (Axios), and the senior Iranian delegation now in Doha (Speaker Ghalibaf + FM Araghchi + central-bank governor Hemmati) working Hormuz + HEU + frozen-asset unfreezing with Qatar's PM is the structural evidence the backchannel is live [CONFIRMED ACTION — delegation in-country]. (3) **IRGC institutional posture = graduated restraint within the Gulf-mediated deal window** — Hormuz 'management' framing is pre-positioning, not a formal toll-mechanism announcement; trigger stays `watching` Day 4 of 14 (by 2026-06-05). No new IRGC Navy daily-transit claim required to read the posture; operationally transits remain minimal, no operational reopening.
sources: Times of Israel May 23 liveblog / BOE Report (Fars 'management' line carried forward uncorrected)
Axios May 24 (US-side 'no tolls' framing; Qatar-IRGC-generals backchannel)
Euronews / Press TV / CNN May 25 (Doha delegation incl. Hemmati)
CBS News liveblog May 21 (Rubio 'unfeasible' red line carried forward)
recent_signals.verification: Fars 'management / not free passage' vs US 'no tolls' contradiction = CONFIRMED both framings on the record (CONTESTED which is in the text); Tasnim 30/60-day split = CONFIRMED (Iranian outlet); IRGC pre-positioning for Iran-Oman toll mechanism = INFERRED institutional read (NOT a formal announcement — trigger stays watching); Doha delegation via IRGC-generals backchannel = CONFIRMED ACTION (delegation in-country) + REPORTED (Axios on the IRGC-generals channel).

recent_signals.headline: **IRGC NAVY CLAIMED 25 SHIPS TRANSITED HORMUZ MAY 23 IN PAST 24H 'WITH IRGC NAVY COORDINATION AND SECURITY' — SECOND CONSECUTIVE DAILY CLAIM IN 25-35 VESSEL RANGE; CLAIM CONTRADICTED BY INDEPENDENT MARITIME TRACKERS. PARALLEL: TASNIM (IRGC-AFFILIATED) MAY 23 REPORTED 'IRAN PREPARING FOR RESUMING FIGHTING WITH THE UNITED STATES AND ISRAEL' — MILITARY SOURCE PRIMARY.** (1) IRGC Navy May 23 claim of 25 vessels transiting (CLAIMED — Al Jazeera secondary, IRGC primary) — independent maritime trackers (Bloomberg, Lloyd's List, UKMTO) continue 'largely frozen' framing; AWRP ~1% holding inconsistent with claim. The claim is propaganda lock-in for Iran-Oman 'permanent toll mechanism' Rubio's May 21 red line rejected. (2) **Tasnim May 23 military-source report of Iran preparing for resumed fighting** is the cleanest Iranian-side public preparation signal of cycle — symmetrically pre-positioning at moment Munir COAS is in Tehran for 'encouraging progress' talks. (3) The kinetic deliverable and diplomatic deliverable running in parallel narrative channels = Sadjadpour two-hubris frame at maximum institutional fanout. IRGC + Khamenei's office substantively NO while civilian government procedurally engaged via Pakistan track.
sources: Al Jazeera May 23 (IRGC claim primary via aggregation)
Tasnim News Agency May 23 (Iran-preparing primary, military source)
Bloomberg / Lloyd's List / UKMTO (independent contradiction of IRGC vessel claim)
recent_signals.verification: IRGC 25-vessel Hormuz claim = CLAIMED (IRGC primary, contradicted by independent maritime trackers); Tasnim 'Iran preparing for resuming fighting' = REPORTED (Tasnim primary, military source attribution).

recent_signals.headline: **DEFENSE SYSTEMS REPORTEDLY ACTIVATED ON QESHM ISLAND IN STRAIT OF HORMUZ LATE MONDAY — IRANIAN OFFICIALS REPORTED 'UNDER CONTROL'** (REPORTED single-source narrative emerging from Trump-postponement coverage; needs second-source corroboration before tagged CONFIRMED). Qeshm is Iran's largest island in the Gulf, sits at the throat of the Strait of Hormuz, hosts IRGC Navy facilities and surface-to-air missile batteries. Any 'activation' of its defense systems is a CONFIRMED operational-readiness posture against potential US/Israeli strikes through the Hormuz corridor. **Consistent with Trump's framing that the postponement is conditional** ('remain prepared for a full-scale assault at a moment's notice') — Iran is publicly reading the postponement as conditional too, and behaving accordingly. The 'under control' language is calibrated to communicate readiness without claiming engagement. **IRGC selective-transit posture on Hormuz remains operative**: Iran is doubling down on the selective-control posture rather than softening into a Hormuz reopening even with the postponement. The graph treats this as a small but operationally real upgrade of the 'Strait of Hormuz remains under Iranian selective control' status (currently active).
sources: Single primary-narrative source surfaced in Trump-postponement coverage
recent_signals.verification: Qeshm Island activation = REPORTED (single-source); operational signature can be cross-checked over coming days; IRGC selective-transit posture = CONFIRMED ongoing structural reality.

recent_signals.headline: **A12 IRGC LAUNCHED 5-DAY 'MARTYRED COMMANDER' / 'LABBAYK YA KHAMENEI' COMBAT EXERCISE AROUND TEHRAN (May 12-onwards)** (CONFIRMED ACTION — Mehr News primary, Press TV, Tasnim, Islam Times, Pars Today, WION, News.az). Mohammad Rasulullah Division (Tehran Corps) under Brig. Gen. Hassan Hassanzadeh: 'enhancing combat ability to counter any hostile move by the American-Zionist enemy.' **Codename invokes the LATE Ali Khamenei (Mojtaba's father), NOT supposedly-active new Supreme Leader = institutional imagery leaning on Ali's legacy because Mojtaba's visible authority is constrained.** Tasnim simultaneously (May 13): 'IRGC Division Holds Anti-Heliborne War Game' — Special Operations counter-insertion drill = Iran preparing for US ground-raid posture that could follow if Sledgehammer ordered (B2 NBC News May 12). Pentagon Sledgehammer naming is the structurally matched US-side preparation. Cleanest single operational confirmation that Iran's military is preparing for restart scenario even as political track continues. Multi-channel state-media synchronisation: IRNA + Tasnim + Mehr News + Press TV + Islam Times + Pars Today all running the drill as top-of-coverage. **CRITICAL TAG-DISCIPLINE: encode as operational-signaling at conservative weight; do NOT promote to 'Iran kinetic restart' — exercise/preparation is not actual kinetic operation.**
sources: Mehr News 'IRGC holds major 5-day combat exercise around Tehran' (Iranian state primary)
Press TV 'IRGC's Tehran command holds major drill to prepare for any US-Israeli aggression'
Tasnim 'IRGC Division Holds Anti-Heliborne War Game'
Islam Times 'IRGC Holds Major 5-Day Combat Exercise around Tehran'

recent_signals.verification: IRGC 'Martyred Commander' 5-day exercise = CONFIRMED ACTION (Iranian state primary multi-source + secondary corroborators) — operational signaling, NOT actual kinetic operation. Tasnim anti-heliborne drill = CONFIRMED ACTION (Tasnim primary).

Press TV: 'Project Freedom perishes... Iran's asymmetric deterrence' — triumphalist victory framing historically precedes deal acceptance.
